name: FinancialClaw
description: Personal finance plugin: expenses, income, recurring payments, and receipt OCR

dbPath.label: Database path
dbPath.help: Absolute path to the SQLite database file. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace/financialclaw.db

FINANCIALCLAW_DB_PATH.description: Override the default SQLite database path (~/.openclaw/workspace/financialclaw.db)

OPENCLAW_CONFIG.description: Path to the OpenClaw configuration file (used by the setup script)
